category.name: Ayushman Bharat - PMJAY
category.description: World's largest government health insurance scheme

facts.value: Rs 5 lakh per family per year on floater basis. No cap on family size. No age restriction. Covers secondary and tertiary hospitalization.
facts.value_hi: प्रति परिवार प्रति वर्ष 5 लाख रुपये।

facts.value: Rural: kaccha house, landless, SC/ST, bonded labour. Urban: rag pickers, street vendors, domestic workers, construction workers, plumbers, security guards. Check at mera.pmjay.gov.in or call 14555.
facts.value_hi: mera.pmjay.gov.in पर या 14555 पर पात्रता जांचें।

facts.key_hi: PMJAY में कोई प्रतीक्षा अवधि नहीं
facts.value: Unlike private insurance, PMJAY has NO waiting period including for pre-existing conditions. All covered treatments available from day one.
facts.value_hi: किसी भी बीमारी के लिए कोई प्रतीक्षा अवधि नहीं।

facts.value: 1) Check eligibility at mera.pmjay.gov.in. 2) Visit Arogya Mitra at empaneled hospital or CSC. 3) Carry Aadhaar/ration card. 4) Biometric verification. 5) e-Card generated instantly. No premium payment required.
facts.value_hi: mera.pmjay.gov.in पर पात्रता जांचें। आरोग्य मित्र से मिलें। आधार लेकर जाएं। कार्ड तुरंत बनता है।

facts.value: 1949 surgical packages across 27 specialties: cardiology (bypass, valve replacement), orthopedics (knee/hip replacement), oncology (chemotherapy), dialysis, kidney transplant, neurosurgery. Pre-hospitalization 3 days, post-hospitalization 15 days covered.
30,000+ empaneled hospitals across India. Find nearest: pmjay.gov.in/hospital or call 14555. Covers 55 crore beneficiaries across 12 crore families.
